content_body:
Best Family Reunion Cabin Rentals

Planning a large family reunion in the North Georgia Mountains can be mighty daunting, but we're here to help! Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers a wonderful selection of luxury properties providing excellent amenities for you and yours. 

Given the variety of things to do in the Blue Ridge Mountains, your family mountain vacation will be nothing short of memorable, experiential, and just plain fun - be it because of a relaxing Toccoa River tube float, sharing family history around the fire pit, or hiking with your kids in the beautiful North GA Mountains.

Historic Downtown Blue Ridge is just minutes away from these upscale Blue Ridge cabin rentals for large groups making it easy for your group to enjoy all that the area has to offer. While some of your family may bond over fly-fishing, golfing, whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River nearby, or a waterfall hike at Amicalola Falls, others may enjoy exploring the boutiques, galleries, home decor shops, and wine tasting shops along Main Street in Downtown Blue Ridge.  Everyone attending your big family reunion in the North GA Mountains will love exploring the nearby trails, wildlife, or boating on Lake Blue Ridge. 

The Family Reunion On The Toccoa River

Looking to host up to 20, 30, and even 40 family members? Look no further. Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers several luxury cabins in close proximity to one another, minimizing the distance between you and your family reunion cabin in Georgia. 

*View our interactive map that shows the vicinity of our properties:

Fallen Timber Lodge - 5 br/5.5 bath - sleeps 12; parallel driveway to Riverview Lodge

  •  With closest access to the big waters of the Toccoa River and the Cherokee Fish Trap, revel in the beauty of the area with flora covering the many fallen timbers which once stood tall.

Riverview Lodge - 5 br/5.5 bath - sleeps 11; parallel driveway to Fallen Timber Lodge

  • Ideally situated to capture this million dollar view, Riverview Lodge sits high on a ridge capturing a panoramic mountain and river view - spacious, secluded, and serene. 

The River's Edge - 5 br/3.5 bath - sleeps 10; located about 1/4 mile from Fallen Timber Lodge + Riverview Lodge. Situated closer to the river w/ easier access from the octagonal deck

  • If privacy and solitude are needed, the large expanse of the three floors will enable you to get away from the action in order to relax your mind.

High Hopes - 4 br/4.5 bath - sleeps 8; located 1.5 miles away

  • Under the stars, create memories with your group in front of the fire pit making s’mores, drinking wine, and telling stories drawing each of you closer together. In such a private setting, nothing could be better.

The (Experiential) Family Reunion in Blue Ridge, GA

Searching for something on the smaller side with a little more space and individuality for your family reunion in GA? Our affordable family reunion locations aren't just limited to the Toccoa River properties. We have large family reunion rentals in the Aska Adventure Area that foster an unforgettable experience for you and your tribe.

Also known as the heartbeat of Fannin County, your family cabin vacation wouldn't be complete without exercising your body and mind in this 17 mile long trail system on national forest lands. Including large portions of the Appalachian Trail System, the Benton MacKaye trail, down to the shores of Lake Blue Ridge.

Our Aska Adventure family vacation cabins focus on bringing the furthest families closer together through shared experiences and unforgettable memories. Predominantly pet and kid friendly, we've considered almost every avenue for adventure and enjoyment for your family reunion in Blue Ridge, GA.

Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary - 3 br/3.5 bath - sleeps 6; located ~ 4 miles down Aska Rd from Blue Ridge; all paved roads

  • Above the shores of Lake Blue Ridge,  transport your heart and soul to the quietness and refuge you crave in this crazy stressful world with this lovely lakeview property.

Above the Timberline - 4 br/3.5 bath - sleeps 8; located ~ 5 miles down Aska Road from Blue Ridge

  • Enough to make you feel that you are a million miles away from the daily grind, this gorgeous cabin offers a refuge with its serene mountain views and unbeatable amenities.

Aska Escape Lodge - 3 br/3 bath - sleeps 6; located 8 miles down Aska Rd from Blue Ridge

  • Perched on a quiet, private hill above the Toccoa River, surrounded by majestic pines, Aska Escape Lodge offers you an irresistible mix of rustic luxury, boundless fun, and carefree relaxation.

Serendipity on Noontootla Creek - 5 br/5.5 bath - sleeps 10; located ~ 13 miles down Aska Road from Blue Ridge; all paved roads

  • The epitome of mountain luxury, Serendipity offers a breathtaking view of pasture covering Noontootla Creek and the backdrop of the Blue Ridge Mountains; a covered gazebo and porch for outside, and an inviting seating area with a gourmet-style kitchen to accompany the best of conversationalists.

Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek - 2 br/2 bath - sleeps 4; located next door to Serendipity on Noontootla Creek.

  • A renovated historic farmhouse located on 30 acres of an old Cherokee settlement along 1/2 mile of the renowned Noontootla Creek frontage with a small pond, fire-pit, and pasture to explore.

Feel free to take a look at our Master Calendar to begin planing your family reunion in Blue Ridge, Georgia! We'd be more than happy to assist you by crunching numbers in a personalized quote, helping provide an itinerary or assortment of things to do to your party of people, and will make your reservation process as seamless as possible with our extensive knowledge of the area. Group gatherings, summer vacations, and big family reunions in the Blue Ridge Mountains are our specialty.

Give us a call today! 706-432-2140
title: Blue Ridge, GA Family Reunion Cabin Rentals
